name: Basic Honey Taffy
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook honey until it reaches the hard crack stage (285°F), stirring constantly.
2. Pour the cooled honey onto a slab of buttered marble.
3. When the edges are cool enough to touch, fold them over and roll into a long log.
4. Begin stretching or pulling the log while it is still warm.
5. Pull until the honey becomes light and porous, with small strings forming.
6. Cut the taffy into short pieces.
7. Store in paper-lined metal cans for two days to allow it to soften.
